calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Placing a Settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq., for the Plaintiff OPAL INVESTMENTS, LLC.
Defendant ANANYA PATANAYAK present in court without an attorney. No attorney appearing for Defendant ANANYA BIONETWORKS, LLC.
Parties sworn and examined by the Court.

Counsel stated on the record that the case has settled. Terms and conditions of Settlement read into the record.
Court ordered matter settled. Counsel for Plaintiff will file a dismissal after defendant has complied with the terms of the settlement.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 4
Judge Pro Tem: Barbara Anscher, Clerk: A. Mok, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Opal Investments, LLC is present. Represented by Joe Fang.
Attorney Joseph K. Bravo for the plaintiff.
Defendants Ananya Patanayak and Ananya Bionetworks, LLC. are present.
Attorney Marc Libarle appearing for defendant Ananya Patanayak and Ananya Bionetworks, LLC in full scope.

Ananya Bionetworks, LLC's Answer has invalid payment/returned check on Nov 19, 2015. Defendant's counsel could not verify Defendant's invalid payment for Defendant Ananya Bionetworks, LLC and will pay prior to trial date since he cannot pay today.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec 14, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
